source.name: Death Mage by Niall Keegan
source.author: Niall Keegan
source.description:
Want to play a Necromancer in 2024 5e? Don't want to wait for WotC to release one officially? Step right this way please, and mind the crates of formaldehyde.
Features of the Death Mage Wizard include:
• Necromancy Savant: There's nothing standard about this Wizard subclass feature - now you can learn ANY Necromancy spell, including the Cleric ones! • Life Siphon: Gain temp HP every time you deal damage with a Necromancy spell, or regain real HP if you roll well. • Necrotic Conduit: Your Undead creatures are tougher and can receive HP and temp HP from your Life Siphon feature. • Blood Magic: Pay 5 max HP per slot level when you cast a spell and only death itself can break your Concentration. (To be fair, death is pretty distracting.) • Maestro of Undeath: Now your Undead creatures can also generate HP and temp HP through Life Siphon when they deal Necrotic damage.
